docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUDSON & KEYSE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TOLBERT, GREGORY DAVID AKA GREGORY TOLBERT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2009

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $275.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TOLBERT, GREGORY DAVID AKA GREGORY TOLBERT
